reportBuilder.title: Report Builder
reportBuilder.subtitle: Create custom reports, filter and export
reportBuilder.customReportDesc: Start by selecting a data source above. Choose columns, filters and date range to instantly generate your report, downloadable as Excel or PDF.
reportBuilder.showing100: Showing first 100 of {{total}} records. Export as Excel/PDF to see all.
reportBuilder.adjustFilters: Try expanding your filters or changing the date range

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.addReportDesc: Click the button to select a report to download
reports.downloadFailed: Report download failed. Please try again.
reports.tip1: Select multiple reports and download them all at once
reports.tip2: Date ranges are set to last 30 days (configurable)
reports.tip3: Excel files contain formatted tables with headers and totals
reports.tip4: All financial amounts are properly formatted with currency symbols
reports.officialGuestListDesc: When tax authorities or an official audit arrives, you can get the official list of all guests staying at the hotel for the selected day from a single screen.
reports.officialGuestListTip: Tip: Bookmark this page for quick access when needed.
reports.nightAuditDesc: Manage your night audit operations: post room revenues, process no-show reservations and complete end-of-day closure.
reports.insightsDesc: Make smarter business decisions with your data
reports.occupancyRateDesc: Compare occupancy rates by selected date range
reports.targetReportDesc: Compare your revenue targets with actual performance
reports.comparisonDesc: Strengthen your business strategy with performance comparisons
reports.pickupReportDesc: Analyze reservation flow speed and channel performance
reports.historyRetentionDesc: Room type based revenue analysis and retention report
reports.paceReportDesc: Country-based guest distribution and pace analysis

dashboard.migrationObservability: Monitor the semantic core migration from the live panel.
dashboard.migrationObservabilityDesc: View outbox event breakdown, audit stream, and shadow mismatch rates in a dedicated control surface. This panel collects operational safety signals before opening new write-paths.
dashboard.migrationObservabilitySide: Observability first, then new write-path — the recommended safety layer for the current migration strategy.

featuresShowcase.title: Features Showcase
featuresShowcase.subtitle: New desktop features - POS Tables, Staff Assignment, Messaging
featuresShowcase.tableMgmtDesc: Manage restaurant tables, track availability, and update status in real-time. 20 tables with capacity tracking and quick status updates.
featuresShowcase.menuMgmtDesc: Browse menu items by category, check prices, costs, and profit margins. 13 items across 4 categories with availability tracking.
featuresShowcase.staffMgmtDesc: View staff members, track efficiency, manage shifts, and assign rooms. 6 staff members with real-time performance metrics.
featuresShowcase.messagingDesc: Send WhatsApp, SMS, and Email messages using templates with variable support. Mock integration ready for production API setup.

migrationObs.heroSubtitle: Operations panel that aggregates outbox throughput, audit trail, and shadow mismatch signals in a single view.
migrationObs.hourlyFlow: Hourly event flow in the last 24 hours
migrationObs.queueDistribution: Pending, processing, processed, failed and parked distribution
migrationObs.eventBreakdownDesc: Distribution of event types migrated to the semantic core
migrationObs.lifecycleDesc: Operational worker state machine and drain signals
migrationObs.auditStreamDesc: Recent migration records with actor, entity, action and correlation context
migrationObs.noData: No migration events found. Events will appear here once the migration process starts.
migrationObs.greenGuidance: Green — next narrow write-path can be opened
migrationObs.yellowGuidance: Yellow — observation and review required before proceeding
migrationObs.redGuidance: Red — new write-path cannot be opened, resolve issues first
migrationObs.reason_mismatch_below_1: Mismatch rate below 1% and no compare errors
migrationObs.staleTriageDesc: Quick control surface explaining yellow health score through event distribution and delivery signals.
migrationObs.assess_continue_with_health: Can continue with current health score signal
migrationObs.assess_all_semantic: All stale pending records are from semantic write-path
migrationObs.assess_no_semantic: No semantic source detected in stale pending records
migrationObs.assess_partial_semantic: {{count}}/{{total}} stale pending records are from semantic source
migrationObs.assess_worker_not_connected: Worker/consumer not connected or outbox state transition lifecycle not yet active
migrationObs.assess_no_consumer_signal: No consumer attempt visible; queue backlog active but no processing signal
migrationObs.assess_consumer_partial: Consumer partially active; state transition or retry behavior needs further investigation
migrationObs.assess_clarify_worker_strategy: Clarify consumer/worker strategy before opening new write-path, define outbox cleanup or explicit park policy if needed
